Auth.signInToOikos: Sign in to your Oikos account
Auth.startEquipping: Start equipping your family. Free forever.
Auth.agreeToTerms: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>
Auth.enterEmailForReset: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
Auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for <bold>{email}</bold>, you'll receive a reset link shortly. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
Auth.makeSureLength: Make sure it's at least 10 characters long.
Auth.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been reset. Signing you in…

Validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
Validation.emailLength: Email must be 255 characters or fewer.
Validation.passwordLength: Password must be 128 characters or fewer.
Validation.firstNameLength: Name must be 100 characters or fewer.
Validation.lastNameLength: Name must be 100 characters or fewer.
Validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 10 characters.
Validation.passwordUppercase: Include at least one uppercase letter.
Validation.passwordLowercase: Include at least one lowercase letter.
Validation.passwordSpecial: Include at least one special character.
Validation.agreeToTermsRequired: You must agree to the Terms of Service to create an account.

ApiErrors.accountLocked: Your account has been temporarily locked. Try again later.
ApiErrors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.
ApiErrors.accountExists: An account with this email already exists.
ApiErrors.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
ApiErrors.noToken: No reset token found in url.
ApiErrors.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Onboarding.step1Sub: Tell us who you are — this is how your family will appear in Oikos.
Onboarding.familyNameHelp: This is how your family will appear to others in the community. It can be a surname, a given name, or anything that feels like home.
Onboarding.shieldHelp: Your family shield is your visual identity in Oikos. It appears on your profile, your children's journals, and in the community directory.
Onboarding.locationHelp: Used to help you connect with nearby families. Never shared without your permission.
Onboarding.step2Heading: Tell us about your faith and values.
Onboarding.step2Sub: This helps your AI assistant understand who you are and respond in a way that aligns with your beliefs.
Onboarding.worldviewLabel: Any teaching convictions we should know about? (optional)
Onboarding.worldviewPlaceholder: We teach from a young-earth creationist perspective. We use the Westminster Catechism.
Onboarding.worldviewHelp: The AI assistant will use this to avoid conflict with your convictions and lean into your framework.
Onboarding.step3Heading: How does your family approach education?
Onboarding.step3Sub: This shapes the default tone and approach of lesson plans, resource suggestions, and discussion questions.
Onboarding.educationHelp: Select up to 3 methods. The first selection is your primary approach.
Onboarding.curriculumPlaceholder: Type a curriculum name and press Enter…
Onboarding.languagesPlaceholder: Type a language and press Enter…
Onboarding.step4Heading: Finally — tell us about your family in your own words.
Onboarding.step4Sub: This is optional but powerful. The more you share, the more your AI assistant will feel like it knows your family.
Onboarding.cultureLabel: Describe your family culture (optional but powerful)
Onboarding.culturePlaceholder: We are a family of six living on a small farm in rural Ireland. We prioritise slow mornings with Scripture reading, followed by structured academics until noon and free exploration in the afternoons…
Onboarding.cultureHelp: This is the most important thing you can give the AI assistant. Write as much or as little as you like.
Onboarding.visibilityHelp: You can change this at any time in Settings. Your location is never shown more precisely than city level.
Onboarding.childrenSub: Add one or more children to your family. You can always add more later from your family settings.
Onboarding.skipConfirm: You can add children later from your family settings.
Onboarding.childDobLabel: Date of birth or approximate age
Onboarding.dobOption: I'll enter their date of birth
Onboarding.ageOption: I'll just enter their approximate age
Onboarding.childGradeHint: Auto-suggested from age, but you can override it.
Onboarding.childLearningStyleLabel: How does this child learn best?
Onboarding.childPersonalityLabel: How would you describe this child's personality?
Onboarding.childPersonalityPlaceholder: Elias is a deeply curious, introverted nine-year-old who loves building things and asking big questions…
Onboarding.childInterestsLabel: What does this child love? (interests, hobbies, passions)
Onboarding.childInterestsPlaceholder: Type an interest and press Enter…
Onboarding.childMotivatorsPlaceholder: Sticker charts, working alongside mum, clear goals, short bursts with breaks
Onboarding.childDemotivatorsLabel: What tends to frustrate or discourage this child?
Onboarding.childDemotivatorsPlaceholder: Open-ended instructions, long reading sessions without discussion, being timed
Onboarding.childNeedsIntro: This information is private and used only to help the AI assistant adapt its approach. It is never shared.
Onboarding.childDifferencesLabel: Does this child have any learning differences or diagnoses? (optional)
Onboarding.childAccommodationsLabel: Any accommodations or approaches that help?
Onboarding.childAccommodationsPlaceholder: Extra time on written work. Prefers dictating answers. Needs movement breaks every 20 minutes.
Onboarding.childSupportPlaceholder: Type a service and press Enter…
Onboarding.welcomeToast: Welcome to Oikos, {familyName}! Now let's meet your children.
